# MuleSoft MuleSoft Terraform Provider

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of MuleSoft Terraform Provider documentation.
> See [MuleSoft Terraform Provider llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mulesoft-terraform-provider/llms-full.txt) for all the MuleSoft Terraform Provider documentation in one file.
